name: subagent-orchestrator
description: Superpowers-style Codex orchestration gate: evaluate every prompt for single-thread, sequential, or parallel subagent execution.

interface.shortDescription: Evaluate whether prompts need subagent orchestration before work begins.
interface.longDescription: A lightweight orchestration gate plus bootstrap skill for Codex. It mirrors the Superpowers pattern by checking process skills before substantive work, while avoiding subagents for simple tasks.
defaultPrompt: Use the subagent orchestration gate first, then proceed.
Evaluate whether this task should be single-thread, sequential, or parallel subagents.
